blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,589 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
